message:
Implement comprehensive string slicing support

Added full Python-compatible string slicing:
- Basic slicing: text[0:5], text[2:7]
- Omitted bounds: text[:5], text[5:], text[:]
- Negative indices: text[-5:], text[:-5], text[-3:-1]
- Step parameter: text[::2], text[1::3]
- Reverse slicing: text[::-1]
- Boundary handling: Out-of-bounds clamping, empty slices

Implementation:
- expressions.zig: Added genSubscript with full slice support
- expressions.zig: Added genSliceIndex for negative index handling
- native_types.zig: Added type inference for subscript nodes

All slicing patterns compile correctly with Python semantics.
Zero memory leaks verified.

Test results: 30 → 32 passing (+2 tests)
